creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

The database update of the Packages is in date of 2010-12-14 06:46:46 UTC. Is this an oversight, usually this database is updated several times by day. Some of my articles on my Web site www.c-extra.com makes refer at the database of the Packages.

Sample:

http://www.c-extra.com/en/freebsd-server8.php
http://www.c-extra.com/fr/serveur-freebsd8.php

http://www.c-extra.com/en/freebsd-8en.php
http://www.c-extra.com/fr/freebsd-8fr.php

In advance, thank you for your response, best regard,

Eric Douzet
